recommendations.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
recommendations.overview: A girl, sent by her parents to live with her two eccentric aunts, finds out on her sixteenth birthday that she is a witch.

recommendations.title: I, Madman
recommendations.overview: A bookshop clerk starts seeing the disfigured killer from her favorite 1950s pulp novels come to life and start killing people around her.

recommendations.title: Sabrina Goes to Rome
recommendations.overview: Sabrina goes to Rome, with Salem stowaway-ed in her backpack, to free her 16th-century aunt Sophia who was banished for divulging her powers to a non-witch.

recommendations.title: Bunks
recommendations.overview: When two trouble-making brothers scam their way into an idyllic summer camp, they find themselves leading a rag tag cabin of boys into breaking every rule in the book.

recommendations.title: Blowback
recommendations.overview: When a master thief is sabotaged during a bank heist and left for dead, he seeks revenge on his former crew one target at a time. Now, with the cops and the mob closing in, he's in the race of his life to reclaim an untold fortune in cryptocurrency f

recommendations.title: The Gate
recommendations.overview: Three young children accidentally release a horde of nasty, pint-sized demons from a hole in a suburban backyard. What follows is a classic battle between good and evil as the three kids struggle to overcome a nightmarish hell that is literally takin

recommendations.title: The Beast from 20,000 Fathoms
recommendations.overview: The controlled explosion of an atomic bomb in the Arctic Circle awakens a frozen dinosaur that will wreak havoc in New York City.

recommendations.title: Solaris
recommendations.overview: A psychologist is sent to a space station orbiting a planet called Solaris to investigate the death of a doctor and the mental problems of cosmonauts on the station. He soon discovers that the water on the planet is a type of brain which brings out r

recommendations.title: On the Town
recommendations.overview: Three sailors wreak havoc as they search for love during a whirlwind 24-hour leave in New York City.

recommendations.title: Let's Be Evil
recommendations.overview: A woman enters an underground bunker where gifted children use augmented reality technology to wreak havoc.
